reason: Project workflow and conventions

Frontend development guide

Runtime prompt injection and conversation-mode integration overview

Closed PRD review gaps around environment-contract fallback order, TESTING.md validity, environmentContractRef format, export fail-closed gating, and user_supplied being temporary chat-only setup input.

Synced the skill-test design matrix contract with environment contract sourcing, source_metadata_json alignment, planning-only lifecycle-chain semantics, and the targeted validation/test points implied by the PRD review closeout.

Implemented Skill Test design matrix environment-source and lifecycle-chain fields, TESTING.md prompt context, fail-closed confirm/export validation, structured source metadata preservation, UI matrix visibility, and draft export fixes for dynamic trigger rows.
Extended Skill Test chat workbench export UX with persisted duplicate/skipped-row summary, Skill Tests deep links, query-param deep-link selection, and source/audit tags for chat-exported drafts.
Closed final @ts-check blockers for the Skill Test workbench flow by narrowing DOM element/event types and using the shared toast controller without changing behavior.

Addressed review polish by keeping environment/chain metadata out of human notes, adding a next-action hint for Phase 1 skipped rows, and strengthening source_metadata_json / structured draft metadata regression coverage.
Added skill-test run session export so run history can download raw session JSONL evidence, exposing agent sandbox behavior alongside the existing normalized run JSON detail export.
Restored chain-run step visibility by returning ordered steps in chain history, rendering inline step cards with run detail/session export actions, and covering step session export from chain audit.

Fixed skill-test run detail/session export for isolated runs by preferring persisted finalized trace snapshots over live main-DB rebuilds, persisting a shared session export copy before case cleanup, adding UI fallback trace reconstruction from debug payloads, and covering the isolated cleanup regression in e2e.

summary: Extended skill-test chat bridge credentials for full+execution and lifecycle chain steps to avoid long docx runs expiring after the short 600s default.
validation: node --test --test-name-pattern="isolated run records skill-test chat bridge auth evidence and scoped env|isolated full execution run extends skill-test chat bridge auth ttl" tests/skill-test/skill-test-e2e.test.js
node --test --test-name-pattern="chain runner executes full execution cases in order and stops after a failed step" tests/skill-test/skill-test-e2e.test.js

reason: Shifted TESTING.md environment sourcing from brittle prose parsing to an explicit skill-test-environment machine block, injected full TESTING.md plus expectedGoal/expectedSteps into skill-test run/design prompts, generated runtime-readable machine blocks in TESTING.md drafts, and added docx-focused regression coverage for the richer execution prompt.

Synced PRD environment-contract language with the implemented hybrid model: full TESTING.md is injected as reference context, while executable gates only trust explicit skill-test-environment machine contract blocks.
Tightened the Skill Test workbench prompt so tracked-change/redline execution scenarios stay phrased as apply/edit work instead of drifting into review-only wording.
Synced the chat-workbench umbrella PRD with the new lifecycle-chain continuation gate and implemented the Skill Tests chain run policy selector plus goal-threshold backend gate.
Updated OpenSandbox pre-baked runtime/CAFF images to include Node plus Python/pip/venv so Python package bootstrap no longer depends on the node:20-bookworm base image having pip.

Started environment assetization by skipping auto TESTING.md bootstrap for default dynamic trigger runs, adding environmentConfig.asset image/profile binding with asset-check env_not_built/env_stale semantics, passing asset images into OpenSandbox isolation, and adding manifest-driven Dockerfile image build support instead of docker commit.

Removed trailing whitespace caught by git diff --check and revalidated environment assetization paths with build, typecheck, public syntax checks, skill-test schema/e2e tests, runtime skill-loading tests, and build-runtime-image syntax check.

summary: Added Skill Tests UI buildImage toggle for environment-build single runs and surfaced environment asset build metadata in run history/detail.
Added shared skill/profile environment assets so environment-build registers reusable defaults and ordinary execution cases can inherit by envProfile without binding to a specific build case.

summary: Extracted full-mode skill-test judge prompts, tool/sequence matching, sequence evidence scoring, and verdict aggregation from skill-test-controller into run-evaluation domain helpers.
Extracted single-case skill-test run orchestration, live event handling, environment-build short-circuiting, and run persistence from skill-test-controller into run-executor domain helpers.
Extracted Skill Test workbench conversation/matrix/export helpers from skill-test-controller into a design-service domain module.
Allowed Skill Test chat workbench matrix export to create environment-build draft cases after environment source confirmation, and added schema/e2e regression coverage.
validation: node --test --test-name-pattern="skill test design export-drafts can create environment-build drafts|buildSkillTestDraftInputFromMatrixRow produces environment-build draft without trigger prompt|buildSkillTestDraftInputFromMatrixRow environment-build with empty environmentConfig still exports" tests/skill-test/skill-test-schema.test.js tests/skill-test/skill-test-e2e.test.js

summary: Moved TESTING.md draft normalization/rendering into a dedicated domain module, fixed environment-build duplicate hints to key off shared asset identity, and preserved structured validation errors for invalid draft headings.
Made missing TESTING.md auto-generate a guarded preview draft during workbench summary/prompt preparation, updated prompt/skill/UI guidance, and added regressions for auto-preview behavior.
validation: git diff --check -- server/domain/skill-test/testing-doc-auto-preview.ts server/domain/skill-test/design-service.ts server/api/skill-test-controller.ts server/domain/conversation/turn/agent-executor.ts server/domain/conversation/turn/agent-prompt.ts public/chat/skill-test-design-panel.js .agents/skills/skill-test-design-workbench/SKILL.md tests/skill-test/skill-test-e2e.test.js tests/runtime/skill-loading.test.js .trellis/spec/skills/skill-testing.md

summary: Retuned the Skill Test chat workbench prompt/skill to default to complete full+execution planning, stopped surfacing MVP wording in user-facing workbench copy, and accepted includeInExport as a matrix alias while defaulting omitted rows to full execution.
Made repeated Skill Test chat-workbench exports reuse same-conversation draft rows instead of creating duplicate drafts, preferring matrixRowId and then normalized prompt/environment-build identity.
Fixed Skill Test case deletion to remove dependent chain-step audit rows before deleting the case so previously executed chain history no longer blocks deletion with a SQLite foreign-key error.

Strengthened Skill Tests chain-run observability by adding live-step jump actions in chain history and the live chain panel, so running nodes no longer wait for persisted run-detail rows before exposing trace access.

Made the Skill Tests runs tab auto-refresh during live run/chain activity via debounced SSE-triggered reloads plus short polling fallback, so persisted run rows and chain history cards appear without reselecting the case.
